channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/6)
channel.description: 今天的热点非常集中：“AI Coding”绝对是C位，各大平台都推出了新的工具和玩法。GitHub上的开源项目、Product Hunt上的新产品，以及社区讨论，都围绕着如何用AI Agent更高效、更安全地写代码。此外，AI Agent的落地应用和安全性问题也是大家讨论的焦点。看起来，AI写代码正在从一个“玩具”变成真正的生产力工具，但同时也带来了新的挑战。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的热点非常集中：“AI Coding”绝对是C位，各大平台都推出了新的工具和玩法。GitHub上的开源项目、Product Hunt上的新产品，以及社区讨论，都围绕着如何用AI Agent更高效、更安全地写代码。此外，AI Agent的落地应用和安全性问题也是大家讨论的焦点。看起来，AI写代码正在从一个“玩具”变成真正的生产力工具，但同时也带来了新的挑战。

item.title: aattaran/deepclaude
item.description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper. | 近期热门 | 总 1348 stars
item.author: aattaran

item.title: vercel-labs/deepsec
item.description: Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents | 近期热门 | 总 1102 stars
item.author: vercel-labs

item.title: mattpocock/dictionary-of-ai-coding
item.description: AI coding jargon, explained in plain English. | 近期热门 | 总 1079 stars
item.author: mattpocock

item.title: vibeforge1111/keep-codex-fast
item.description: A backup-first Codex skill for keeping local Codex state fast, clean, and recoverable. | 近期热门 | 总 763 stars
item.author: vibeforge1111

item.title: Tommy-yw/RunbookHermes
item.description: Hermes-native AIOps agent for evidence-driven incident response, approval-gated remediation, and runbook learning. | 近期热门 | 总 518 stars
item.author: Tommy-yw

item.title: crafter-station/petdex
item.description: Public gallery of animated Codex pets | 近期热门 | 总 425 stars
item.author: crafter-station

item.title: matthart1983/syswatch
item.description: Single-host system diagnostics TUI. Sibling to netwatch. Twelve tabs, plain-English insights, session scrubber. macOS + Linux. | 近期热门 | 总 361 stars
item.author: matthart1983

item.title: StartupHakk/OpenMonoAgent.ai
item.description: (BETA) AI shouldn't have a meter. Unlimited tokens. Forever. Your machine. Your agent. Use it from anywhere. Terminal-native coding agent powered by local LLMs — 100% open source, free forever, and installed with a single command. Proudly built on C#/.NET, because AI tooling should be infrastructure, not a subscription. | 近期热门 | 总 297 stars
item.author: StartupHakk

item.title: evanphi7/lighthouse-router
item.description: Off-chain DEX route discovery on Solana — pool decoders, multi-hop quoting, and arbitrage cycle detection | 近期热门 | 总 157 stars
item.author: evanphi7
